li.task-list-item[data-task=\"l\"].text-shadow: 0 0 calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 0.08px) color-mix(in srgb, var(--bu-accent) calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 1%), transparent)

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"p\"].text-shadow: 0 0 calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 0.08px) color-mix(in srgb, var(--bu-accent) calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 1%), transparent)

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"S\"].text-shadow: 0 0 calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 0.08px) color-mix(in srgb, var(--bu-accent) calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 1%), transparent)

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"u\"].text-shadow: 0 0 calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 0.08px) color-mix(in srgb, var(--bu-accent) calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 1%), transparent)

li.task-list-item[data-task=\"w\"].text-shadow: 0 0 calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 0.08px) color-mix(in srgb, var(--bu-accent) calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 1%), transparent)

li[data-line=\"0\"].text-shadow: 0 0 calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 0.08px) color-mix(in srgb, var(--bu-accent) calc(var(--bu-glow-text, 55) * 1%), transparent)

pre.background: rgb(10, 9, 8) repeating-linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 2px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35) 3px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre::after.--ec-codeFontFml: '??', '??', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, "Cascadia Mono", "Roboto Mono", "DejaVu Sans Mono", "Liberation Mono", Menlo, Monaco, "Consolas", "Source Code Pro", monospace
pre::after.--ec-codeSelBg: color-mix(in oklch, hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) 20%, transparent)
pre::after.--ec-uiFontFml: '??', '??', '??', ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", "Inter", "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif
pre::after.--ec-uiSelBg: color-mix(in oklch, hsl(calc(258 - 1), calc(88% * 1.01), calc(66% * 1.075)) 20%, transparent)
pre::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid).background: rgb(10, 9, 8) repeating-linear-gradient(rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 0px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) 2px, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.35) 3px) repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre:has(> code.language-mermaid)::after.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
